ActivationRequest.title: ActivationRequest
ActivationRequest.description: Premium access code requests from teachers, including transfer receipt images

id.description: Unique identifier for the request record

principalNip.description: NIP identification code of the principal

teacherName.description: Name of the teacher requesting code

teacherNip.description: NIP identifier code of the teacher

jabatan.description: Job title or position of the teacher

faseKelas.description: Assigned learning phase and school grade level

receiptBase64.description: Base64 encoded string of receipt or proof of payment transfer image

requestCode.description: Randomly generated code unique to this user requesting

activationCode.description: The active premium license code issued to user

totalAmount.description: Calculated grand total price in Indonesian Rupiah

SupportMessage.title: SupportMessage
SupportMessage.description: Real-time communication chat messages between clients and administrators

requestId.description: Associated request code or license session token

sender.description: Type of sender: user, admin, system

LicensedUser.title: LicensedUser
LicensedUser.description: Premium school user profile data and generated files synced from cloud

code.description: Active license verification code of school admin

documents.description: Serialized JSON string of omega_db_documents array

studentsList.description: Serialized JSON string of student profiles/registries

/activation_requests/{requestId}.description: Central collection for managing activation code access requests and payments

/support_messages/{messageId}.description: Direct communication logs linked to request IDs and code flows

/licensed_users/{licenseCode}.description: Cloud backup of premium license holders' school profile, students, and documents
